CVE-2021-45464.title: kvmtool through 39181fc allows an out-of-bounds write, related to ...
CVE-2021-45464.description: kvmtool through 39181fc allows an out-of-bounds write, related to virtio/balloon.c and virtio/pci.c. This allows a guest OS user to execute arbitrary code on the host machine.
